instruction: Someone repainted the yellow sparkle on the aperture icon dark gray. Set it back to the original.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/aperture.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><line x1="14.31" y1="8" x2="20.05" y2="17.94"/><line x1="9.69" y1="8" x2="21.17" y2="8"/><line x1="7.38" y1="12" x2="13.12" y2="2.06"/><line x1="9.69" y1="16" x2="3.95" y2="6.06"/><line x1="14.31" y1="16" x2="2.83" y2="16"/><line x1="16.62" y1="12" x2="10.88" y2="21.94"/></g>
  <polyline id="sparkle" fill="none" stroke="#444444" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="20,64 24,60 28,64 24,68 20,64" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />

  <polyline id="sparkle" fill="none" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="20,64 24,60 28,64 24,68 20,64" />
</svg>
